name: Love's Sacrifice

spell.name: Love's Sacrifice
spell.access: Characters who go to Sihedron Academy or have the runelord class archetype have access to this spell.
spell.trigger: You take damage that would reduce you to 0 Hit Points.
spell.success: The creature moves adjacent to you, moving further than its Speed if necessary as the magic compels it to exceed its limits. It takes half the damage you would have taken, while you take the rest. If you would be reduced to 0 Hit Points, you’re reduced to 1 instead.
spell.failure: As success, except they take the full damage. If the damage reduces them to 0 Hit Points, they immediately die; this is a death effect.

text: You cry out for aid, and a creature near you feels compelled tothrow itself in front of the threat as the ultimate expressionof their love. A target that genuinely loves the caster withoutmagical compulsion, at their player’s or the GM’s discretion,fails the save.
